rationale: Civil Engineer title at a fictional company (Pied Piper) with a career description that is actually enterprise sales; summary admits marketing manager background with only casual ChatGPT experimentation — no ML, IR, or engineering relevance whatsoever.

Career spans Business Analyst at Wayne Enterprises (fictional), accounting, and brand/content roles with zero ML or IR experience; summary is a marketing manager profile with only ChatGPT curiosity, and skills list (dbt, Salesforce CRM, HTML, Excel) has no relevance to retrieval, ranking, or applied ML.

Content Writer whose entire career is at fictional/IT-services companies (Dunder Mifflin, Stark Industries, Wipro, Wayne Enterprises) in non-technical roles (content, mechanical engineering, project management, marketing); no ML, Python, or IR skills present.

7-year data engineer from BITS Pilani with strong Python/Spark/Airflow foundations and Weaviate listed as advanced skill (41 months), but all career is at fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Pied Piper) and work descriptions show no actual embedding-based retrieval or ranking system ownership — core IR/ranking production experience is absent despite relevant skill claims.

Project Manager whose career is entirely in marketing leadership, business analysis, and customer support at fictional companies (Stark Industries, Dunder Mifflin, Wayne Enterprises); no engineering or ML substance despite superficial tech skill listings.

3-year software engineer with full-stack web background (React, Node.js) at a single IT-services company (Mindtree) and only self-learner level AI exposure; 'Fine-tuning LLMs' listed as advanced despite no production ML work, with no IR/retrieval/ranking experience and insufficient depth for the role.

4.7-year data engineer at real EdTech product companies (upGrad, Unacademy) with solid Python/SQL/Spark/Snowflake/dbt background and FAISS listed as intermediate skill (31 months), but career descriptions show purely analytics/data-warehouse work with no production retrieval, ranking, or embedding system experience.

Business Analyst/Sales Executive with entire career at IT-services (Wipro) and fictional companies (Stark Industries) in customer support and sales roles; skills are Agile/Salesforce/Docker with no ML or IR relevance, and PhD in Physics adds no applicable technical depth for this role.

9.9-year Sales Executive/Accountant at Stark Industries and Infosys with career descriptions in content writing, operations, and mechanical engineering — a classic anti-persona honeypot with recent LangChain/RAG course mentions masking a completely non-technical career.

7.9-year .NET Developer with MIT AI degree but career entirely in QA test automation and full-stack web at IT-services firms (HCL, Mphasis) plus a fintech product company (Razorpay); no production ML, retrieval, or ranking work — only a small self-built RAG side project mentioned in summary.
